<!--
Pick the right template for your change instead of this default:

- Adding / editing registry records:
  ?expand=1&template=registry-update.md
- Changing the data shape (columns, formats, docs/SCHEMA.md):
  ?expand=1&template=schema-change.md
- Repo chore (CI, deps, docs, templates, config — no data, no schema):
  ?expand=1&template=chore.md

Append the query string to the compare URL, e.g.
https://github.com/vig-os/part-registry/compare/main...your-branch?expand=1&template=registry-update.md
-->

## Summary

<!-- What does this PR change and why? -->

## Type of change

PR templates are keyed to *what* changes — records, schema (data shape), or repo
plumbing; the issue (feature / bug / chore / registry change request) captures
intent.

- [ ] Registry data update (records) — see `registry-update.md`
- [ ] Schema change (columns / formats / docs/SCHEMA.md) — see `schema-change.md`
- [ ] Repo chore (CI / deps / docs / templates / config) — see `chore.md`
